# Handoff Review Checklist

- [ ] Current owner is named by role.
- [ ] Last validation command is listed.
- [ ] Eval score or failure state is listed.
- [ ] Known limitations are visible.
- [ ] Public-safe data boundary is visible.
- [ ] Production blockers are listed.
- [ ] Next step is concrete.

Do not approve handoff if it says production-ready without the production bridge
review.
